extension.description: A drop-in replacement over official Kodi YouTube add-on to allow for trailers playback without login / api key NOTE: Does not allow browsing YouTube content. Simply for playback.
extension.news: Allow setting Native Android Playback App ID

extension.description: [COLOR deepskyblue]Newf's Wizard[/COLOR] + Cache Cleaner offers many maintenance features, selective add-on data saving, and automated build installs.

extension.summary: Access your content from Easynews and Debrid Clouds.
extension.description: This add-on is intended for advanced Kodi users only. You must own the content of any media you play through this addon. This is an English language only add-on.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
extension.news: INFO: For latest changes see Changelog within Tools of add-on.

extension.summary: Made for Finder Addon, it is basically estuary with minmal changes to the Movie and TVShow Menu widgets.
extension.license: CC BY-SA 4.0, GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE Version 2.0
extension.description: Finder is basically estuary with minmal changes to the Movie and TVShow Menu widgets. It is meant to be used with Finder Addon with trakt enabled. The Movie Menu will take you to your Trakt Movie Collection list, not Watchlist and the Widgets will be for Trakt Trending, Premieres, Latest releases items etc. The same goes for TVShows Menu item, it takes you to your Trakt TVShow Collection and similar Widgets. Works clean and fast just like estaury. You can edit the Home.xml (tip search myflix in file) within the addon folder yourself if you want to change the items to Watchlist vice collection items or change the widget links for what you prefer.

Popcorn is a modular provider based, cloud service streaming software that is tightly interwoven with Trakt. Popcorn provides the freedom to view media from a single menu system from service providers of the users choosing. Please Note: This addon requires the use of a compatible cloud service.
extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE. Version 3, 29 June 2007
extension.disclaimer: Last updated: 15 March 2024 to fix Kodi video DB The information contained within the Popcorn software (the "Service") is for general information purposes only. The author assumes no responsibility for errors, omissions in the contents on the Service, nor does it assume responsibility for any material provided by any external services. The use of the Service does not author the user to engage in any kind of illegal, criminal or tortious activity through the use of the software, including infringement of any third party intellectual property rights (including without limitation copyright, trade marks, patent, trade secrets and confidential information), fraud, child pornography, trafficking in obscene material, violation of applicable export restrictions, drug dealing, gambling, harassment, stalking, spamming, hacking, sending of viruses or other harmful files or illegal posting of computer passwords or computer code. The user is responsible for all their activity in connection with the use of the Service and the author reserves the right to report any potentially criminal activity to appropriate law enforcement agencies. The user must not transmit to or via the Service, any material that may infringe the intellectual property rights of any third party, or any defamatory, derogatory or offensive material or publication. In no event shall the author of this software be liable for any special, direct, indirect, consequential, or incidental damages or any damages whatsoever, whether in an action of contract, negligence or other tort, arising out of or in connection with the use of the Service or the contents of the Service. The author reserves the right to make additions, deletions, or modification to the contents on the Service at any time without prior notice. The author of this software does not warrant that the software is free of viruses or other harmful components. Popcorn may contain links to external websites that are not provided or maintained by or in any way affiliated with the author. Please note that the author does not guarantee the accuracy, relevance, timeliness, or completeness of any information on these external websites.
extension.news: Changelog 5.0.1, to fix Kodi video DB

extension.summary: estuary is basically estuary with minmal changes to the Movie and TVShow Menu widgets.
extension.license: CC BY-SA 4.0, GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE Version 2.0
extension.description: Sestuary is basically estuary with minmal changes to the Movie and TVShow Menu widgets. It is meant to be used with Seren Addon with trakt enabled. The Movie Menu will take you to your Trakt Movie Collection list, not Watchlist and the Widgets will be for Trakt Trending, Premieres, Latest releases items etc. The same goes for TVShows Menu item, it takes you to your Trakt TVShow Collection and similar Widgets. Works clean and fast just like estaury. You can edit the Home.xml (tip search seren in file) within the addon folder yourself if you want to change the items to Watchlist vice collection items or change the widget links for what you prefer.
Adds Context Menu items for Popcorn menu items throughout Kodi
Voegt contextmenu-items toe voor Popcorn-menu-items in Kodi
extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE. Version 3, 29 June 2007
extension.news:
Changelog 3.0.1 Fix Shuffle play copy pasta mix up Resolve settings not showing in Kodi
Changelog 3.0.0 Re-write of context menu addon, supporting py3 only (Matrix and above) Update icons to match Popcorn 3.0.0 release Update language support set to match Popcorn (add auto-translated Hebrew)
Changelog 2.2.0 Added "Rescrape and Source Select" context menu item.
Changelog 2.1.2 Added Polish translation
Changelog 2.1.1: Implemented a workaround for broken future.backports module method (fixes Leia issues)
Changelog 2.1.0: Refactored code to modern standards Use backported URL lib for py2 to ensure unicode compatibility Extracted out common functions and reused Add settings to enable/disable individual items Add more localizations Add GitHub issue templates
Changelog 2.0.2: Make python version agnostic
Changelog 2.0.1: Fixed addon icons/fanart
Changelog 2.0.0: Rework for Popcorn 2.0

extension.description: Newfs kodi stuff

extension.summary: Display the weather dialog as screensaver
extension.description: Display the weather dialog as screensaver

extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE. Version 3, 29 June 2007
extension.summary: The position from which something or someone is observed.[CR]
extension.description: This is a Non-profit resource, organized solely for educational purposes which is protected under the Fair-Use doctrine of the Copyright Act, Specifically section 107, which does promote freedom of expression, by permitting the unlicensed use of copyright-protected works.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.[CR]The author is in no way affiliated with Kodi, Team Kodi, or the XBMC Foundation.
extension.news: INFO: For latest changes see Changelog within add-on.

extension.summary: Newf is basically estuary with minmal changes to the Movie and TVShow Menu widgets.
extension.license: CC BY-SA 4.0, GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE Version 2.0
extension.description: Newf is basically estuary with minmal changes to the Movie and TVShow Menu widgets. It is meant to be used with Newf Addon (Fork of POV) with trakt enabled. The Movie Menu will take you to your Trakt Movie Collection list, not Watchlist and the Widgets will be for Trakt Trending, Premieres, Latest releases items etc. The same goes for TVShows Menu item, it takes you to your Trakt TVShow Collection and similar Widgets. Works clean and fast just like estaury. You can edit the Home.xml (tip search myflix in file) within the addon folder yourself if you want to change the items to Watchlist vice collection items or change the widget links for what you prefer.
Xumo Play is your destination for free LIVE and on-demand streaming channels ranging from sports highlights to fun recipes to music and festival coverage to stand up comedy.
extension.news: Fix for limit of 25 items on VOD categories.

extension.description: Seren is a modular provider based, cloud service streaming software that is tightly interwoven with Trakt. Seren provides the freedom to view media from a single menu system from service providers of the users choosing. Please Note: This addon requires the use of a compatible cloud service.
extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE. Version 3, 29 June 2007
extension.disclaimer: Last updated: September 09, 2019. The information contained within the Seren software (the "Service") is for general information purposes only. The author assumes no responsibility for errors, omissions in the contents on the Service, nor does it assume responsibility for any material provided by any external services. The use of the Service does not author the user to engage in any kind of illegal, criminal or tortious activity through the use of the software, including infringement of any third party intellectual property rights (including without limitation copyright, trade marks, patent, trade secrets and confidential information), fraud, child pornography, trafficking in obscene material, violation of applicable export restrictions, drug dealing, gambling, harassment, stalking, spamming, hacking, sending of viruses or other harmful files or illegal posting of computer passwords or computer code. The user is responsible for all their activity in connection with the use of the Service and the author reserves the right to report any potentially criminal activity to appropriate law enforcement agencies. The user must not transmit to or via the Service, any material that may infringe the intellectual property rights of any third party, or any defamatory, derogatory or offensive material or publication. In no event shall the author of this software be liable for any special, direct, indirect, consequential, or incidental damages or any damages whatsoever, whether in an action of contract, negligence or other tort, arising out of or in connection with the use of the Service or the contents of the Service. The author reserves the right to make additions, deletions, or modification to the contents on the Service at any time without prior notice. The author of this software does not warrant that the software is free of viruses or other harmful components. Seren may contain links to external websites that are not provided or maintained by or in any way affiliated with the author. Please note that the author does not guarantee the accuracy, relevance, timeliness, or completeness of any information on these external websites.

extension.description: Adds Context Menu items for Seren menu items throughout Kodi
Voegt contextmenu-items toe voor Seren-menu-items in Kodi
extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE. Version 3, 29 June 2007
extension.news:
Changelog 3.0.2 Compressed icons from 3.53 MB to 1.34 Update background color to Black
Changelog 3.0.1 Fix Shuffle play copy pasta mix up Resolve settings not showing in Kodi
Changelog 3.0.0 Re-write of context menu addon, supporting py3 only (Matrix and above) Update icons to match Seren 3.0.0 release Update language support set to match Seren (add auto-translated Hebrew)
Changelog 2.2.0 Added "Rescrape and Source Select" context menu item.
Changelog 2.1.2 Added Polish translation
Changelog 2.1.1: Implemented a workaround for broken future.backports module method (fixes Leia issues)
Changelog 2.1.0: Refactored code to modern standards Use backported URL lib for py2 to ensure unicode compatibility Extracted out common functions and reused Add settings to enable/disable individual items Add more localizations Add GitHub issue templates
Changelog 2.0.2: Make python version agnostic
Changelog 2.0.1: Fixed addon icons/fanart
Changelog 2.0.0: Rework for Seren 2.0

extension.description: This add-on tests your Internet bandwith and reports both download and upload speeds and latency from within Kodi. Use this if you are experiencing streaming issues and you suspect your network to be the cause.
extension.disclaimer: Speed Tester is powered by speedtest.net

extension.description: Listen to more than 1,500 live radio stations from coast-to-coast including pop, country, urban, rock, talk, and college.[CR] Browse radio stations by music genre and location.[CR] Read more: http://news.iheart.com/about/

extension.summary: Made for Fenlight-Festuary is basically estuary with minmal changes to the Movie and TVShow Menu widgets.
extension.license: CC BY-SA 4.0, GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE Version 2.0
extension.description: Festuary is basically estuary with minmal changes to the Movie and TVShow Menu widgets. It is meant to be used with FenLight Addon with trakt enabled. The Movie Menu will take you to your Trakt Movie Collection list, not Watchlist and the Widgets will be for Trakt Trending, Premieres, Latest releases items etc. The same goes for TVShows Menu item, it takes you to your Trakt TVShow Collection and similar Widgets. Works clean and fast just like estaury. You can edit the Home.xml (tip search myflix in file) within the addon folder yourself if you want to change the items to Watchlist vice collection items or change the widget links for what you prefer.

extension.summary: Pestuary is basically estuary with minmal changes to the Movie and TVShow Menu widgets.
extension.license: CC BY-SA 4.0, GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE Version 2.0
extension.description: Pestuary is basically estuary with minmal changes to the Movie and TVShow Menu widgets. It is meant to be used with Popcorn Addon (Seren Fork) with trakt enabled. The Movie Menu will take you to your Trakt Movie Collection list, not Watchlist and the Widgets will be for Trakt Trending, Premieres, Latest releases items etc. The same goes for TVShows Menu item, it takes you to your Trakt TVShow Collection and similar Widgets. Works clean and fast just like estaury. You can edit the Home.xml (tip search myflix in file) within the addon folder yourself if you want to change the items to Watchlist vice collection items or change the widget links for what you prefer.
A module that can be used to provide site scrapers.
extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE. Version 3, 29 June 2007
extension.disclaimer: The author is not responsible for the use of this addon. The author is not responsible for the content found using this addon. extension.description: This add-on is intended for advanced Kodi users only. You must own the content of any media you play through this addon. This is an English language only add-on.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
